name: Herschel Walker
subject: [WATCH] personal message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=68e8fd78f37f4b6287e33d1bce80e537&_e=X-9ivnBrFD6_WVPPuzAwfoJ3pNey4R8Lc08FbVEKa9KfIM1O15NziZEM-BMvt3bp3W7HhzdrpmxxWTqYu83qARdEFRBWjRF6RBkprOc1UlDn0w9QQnouy2kGpLeWbMWgIUJcE-sBPtrkelYpk4DCt7pvrHRf7egQ443tuo7144N3xZsZpkheaSLxParE_u8UQWUjnqcKZ7Pjv7gmgLpXmxoPA6TrBYCKuR_PVb5Y3CcFZQnmCDNtCYILTGypaqVN7UKzovziQ261EipAIiiG9Gf-0XkaawW3s3GldeSbfrfzC5vJ4EhRZJLTEXK8nA_vY3Lkwi6Hc98yrEHY-GtrkFFtO1XCu_M174vB7KNk4_himijAa4CC60AJ5hgYhPGiHUAu41Y0DJV8tdfreE6Pgmh1HkgNkQM3kfwLNMukGuOr0APCSgD_UguIe-QUpckHus4qV1ZxzAiZHg4xd64GDiYhzNesJSltKivbeBwV82LO-CyfM9NvFqeHHTzymGhT)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=68e8fd78f37f4b6287e33d1bce80e537&_e=X-9ivnBrFD6_WVPPuzAwfoJ3pNey4R8Lc08FbVEKa9KfIM1O15NziZEM-BMvt3bp3W7HhzdrpmxxWTqYu83qARdEFRBWjRF6RBkprOc1UlDn0w9QQnouy2kGpLeWbMWgIUJcE-sBPtrkelYpk4DCt7pvrHRf7egQ443tuo7144N3xZsZpkheaSLxParE_u8UQWUjnqcKZ7Pjv7gmgLpXmxoPA6TrBYCKuR_PVb5Y3CcFZQnmCDNtCYILTGypaqVN7UKzovziQ261EipAIiiG9Gf-0XkaawW3s3GldeSbfrcR_6OUZJD85iYd1ppWNAvJVoD-3f_a9RoPHJYYaXa7wtqJM_8741woQERgLTHPfRtx5ea2NjdPnlDW2Mz_i9lTFUp_cdj8S44uoIND30g9BIDg_Wa-itz-fSLS8tCLfcLNQ3cMrDvzIB6M_cj4uO59Zq1fn2o-c8n1tfPv21N3JJU4SJYRJmsSaXuY8nfC8ejIPz77CIu5Xc9ywSKhMIey)**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=68e8fd78f37f4b6287e33d1bce80e537&_e=X-9ivnBrFD6_WVPPuzAwfoJ3pNey4R8Lc08FbVEKa9KfIM1O15NziZEM-BMvt3bp3W7HhzdrpmxxWTqYu83qARdEFRBWjRF6RBkprOc1UlDn0w9QQnouy2kGpLeWbMWgIUJcE-sBPtrkelYpk4DCt7pvrHRf7egQ443tuo7144N3xZsZpkheaSLxParE_u8UQWUjnqcKZ7Pjv7gmgLpXmxoPA6TrBYCKuR_PVb5Y3CcFZQnmCDNtCYILTGypaqVN7UKzovziQ261EipAIiiG9Gf-0XkaawW3s3GldeSbfreIQ6a9hqWVfi5bxd_FM35EKz80PAJd71JPIZ1vbEpm5ZqyS23sO9XYUHxUs-r8MGFaMJ1xeIu2y-nKBDhaHpr4NIkto84EYpsmxB20U1Y7tCUBJYK6uYOGZXAK5S69iC4sx0dwnDcwdLbaG7U1nFTxLSI1VXUtr0-HNNS7kbLWrMtGXGhSOh3AF0MyXQ-S9g_3xROeg0_GOE03RU_mwo79)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=68e8fd78f37f4b6287e33d1bce80e537&_e=X-9ivnBrFD6_WVPPuzAwfoJ3pNey4R8Lc08FbVEKa9KfIM1O15NziZEM-BMvt3bp3W7HhzdrpmxxWTqYu83qARdEFRBWjRF6RBkprOc1UlDn0w9QQnouy2kGpLeWbMWgIUJcE-sBPtrkelYpk4DCt7pvrHRf7egQ443tuo7144N3xZsZpkheaSLxParE_u8UQWUjnqcKZ7Pjv7gmgLpXmxoPA6TrBYCKuR_PVb5Y3CcFZQnmCDNtCYILTGypaqVN7UKzovziQ261EipAIiiG9Gf-0XkaawW3s3GldeSbfrdmF7fAVP78-InuTDTb1LuKjGk2TqhMAfqtWY52_jkkC3a45ruKfXMYfu7mLgBHD7pzmxMduhF1JijEzCfq-x35CUMVu4QEVROZMT-RJE9qxNPym6YEDZreInyjUNuywZYATbo1BkX-HtUBbOqzGWE0Jws_XTw0kXdaZ85iRSSYDAgHS5-1o2f74p9pfcWvpAQidHpGpMomCgRMCTFRpLGr) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=68e8fd78f37f4b6287e33d1bce80e537&_e=X-9ivnBrFD6_WVPPuzAwfoJ3pNey4R8Lc08FbVEKa9KfIM1O15NziZEM-BMvt3bp3W7HhzdrpmxxWTqYu83qARdEFRBWjRF6RBkprOc1UlDn0w9QQnouy2kGpLeWbMWgIUJcE-sBPtrkelYpk4DCt7pvrHRf7egQ443tuo7144N3xZsZpkheaSLxParE_u8UQWUjnqcKZ7Pjv7gmgLpXmxoPA6TrBYCKuR_PVb5Y3CcFZQnmCDNtCYILTGypaqVN7UKzovziQ261EipAIiiG9Gf-0XkaawW3s3GldeSbfrcLFjPFcj_yRnzsne5iHmdadHQtLwEru6MMZ3cGJiV2MTLRYHLzaZwQhYq8J1SKhX6fkL-y7Nh-F3oidjhF-GImPk5sG2-tx0rXKEzRH1EtrE61CWSFETR0-BGRrOum77Fzo88Crov7_EVz_6LE5_6yjBR9xD6KQdzaA9_DO8wRDuKAGRwyt-HP8FVcvkhBm0nZb7-PpvldZ5N4pJmLx9wY)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=68e8fd78f37f4b6287e33d1bce80e537&_e=X-9ivnBrFD6_WVPPuzAwfoJ3pNey4R8Lc08FbVEKa9KfIM1O15NziZEM-BMvt3bp3W7HhzdrpmxxWTqYu83qARdEFRBWjRF6RBkprOc1UlDn0w9QQnouy2kGpLeWbMWgIUJcE-sBPtrkelYpk4DCt7pvrHRf7egQ443tuo7144N3xZsZpkheaSLxParE_u8UQWUjnqcKZ7Pjv7gmgLpXmxoPA6TrBYCKuR_PVb5Y3CcFZQnmCDNtCYILTGypaqVN7UKzovziQ261EipAIiiG9Gf-0XkaawW3s3GldeSbfrfc7WQO2OJihRv6kwvWOV5P0RbNpLQtA_oaJ9XtB08uGBsVPn4FvsFpGIsBUCZiobJ8N4bY5StRLoxesXwMuLINQ9WyYNXTxy_eAwVZAglhZx8lfca_YsferrIYmzQwouGHcaZmrFSB-7tGkRdd6sMSTok9rSR93k1jiUbTY-H12Y4ds286GCSMu3E613MuQGtEuts5AzX6JHGx2jDvAPzy)**

name: Georgia Senate Alert
subject: The most vulnerable Senate Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Raphael Warnock needs your help | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84uYHqB3J86kKmo8MY6Cx8ov2y0kmM8BXrSnwBcURGdadWpqgnIN1ZhAROdk0pbW7Sedvj_nNPEtteXwicywYBl8iqQUCnP-Q0wtJCoOtrOJunE9HcAUAlerT145q7faIs9_XxWRc1SL6sZAIzSJaQ1J4P1n9n7QEoqNF-ReBYf9By2k8euocIe7s7j_yG_6YjHeRwYXtQL3p6H8VtxgNveMZiBbE1_JopzVkmKtNBPA1O7x4iTS5m7Ecn8wzumWVahWBFdaxEH02OPaaMBatQ7l66tsbqCcYClRxxsXj8O_TG4BmUMNOj36JNAJp4gil7-EDqsNv1wj4Thnz_H4CxLw/3f2/ZZJ0nh45SD6C06XnYjoAAg/h0/x_ROPDKklTxYEluL76E4E8gDThmoi8PbbgAn3j8-36o)
Derek, this news is coming at the WORST possible time: if Democrats lose even ONE Senate seat, we'll lose our majority – and Democrat Raphael Warnock was just named one of our most vulnerable incumbents!

That's why Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are making him their TOP target for defeat. They launched a brand-new attack ad to smear Raphael's record – and you can bet they'll be mobilizing their shady megadonors to spend MILLIONS more to flip this seat red.

Raphael is the moral warrior we need to keep Georgia blue, defend our Senate majority and pass our bold, progressive agenda. **But with time running out before our critical deadline, we're still falling dangerously short of the resources we need to fight back against these vicious attack ads and win this race.**

Derek, with the Senate split 50-50, there is NO room for error – and hitting critical fundraising goals like this could mean all the difference between winning and losing. **So with our midnight deadline rapidly approaching, we have to ask:**

[**Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between our campaign and Common Good VA to help protect Sen. Warnock’s seat, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84iPmh9y_m8oPlvmdtXe3jgUjWrQ879vPldRO1YtnxTmUCyOQOOmTib6Vz02xeKONQunXDG9nX9rle2kMBUAS6ITuMz0m5PYjEVrQVCujiSvJNxi9dvqb4_u9cghZwLIDw4UNkKe3QcYJOl2HjEBWXaKEmTDJsbX8BgW64urQxEoufrKtrYPMnIj_-sAOzw2e26557gp_qbmNBjSANPbr_sgChK3nVdqL4YOm32WuOo1D-7ehLC-gZJDCklNxjulnJsVS7FI77vCWzGt55P35SEG36RtHTKbUS_QlB_o059o-ru3NuFlD9Vx7EKooCuGfxPs42N-YZS1M-cFk0R0vG_FZbITT9YUoDesWKOjuBSOk/3f2/ZZJ0nh45SD6C06XnYjoAAg/h1/h-FY7mUccRpOCoQM_2GkmG2jPn5Qm9ZGjWDHi6S-erg) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84iPmh9y_m8oPlvmdtXe3jgUjWrQ879vPldRO1YtnxTmUuX12LkHhGrKcnlt4o7IYYmy-ZBadu_jIQ-ErlO3WKCzkp-ypAN60Le06E9_p9nhmqZHnYKdFVxBfu2zKcrAaUQcMWfmy21-dp-IOUtO6nLNa3R7coE1lDOFOxl_aqkCqWYi-a5PMLGUV1u8Nccz2lkpXWxaPcunQrOF1pw0zvUBddW6OlqSo9rzRsyhkSnWSvVHNZet9VxAve_artide4tGA2jK7ndnW_0l2KBNCaMRAvRTLqvu1fiBQkspwNMjYwGfMXdDVqfGGjSNOUVemje7EdR3JhKQBdEVI4swqiU-CifDv_r3OLEQ0yuQ0ZGz8/3f2/ZZJ0nh45SD6C06XnYjoAAg/h2/sRW6SUsQo524VX1lhBcVqQazwIv05iLBm8NUYRa8tRE)

clean_body: Raphael Warnock needs your help | | | Derek, this news is coming at the WORST possible time: if Democrats lose even ONE Senate seat, we'll lose our majority – and Democrat Raphael Warnock was just named one of our most vulnerable incumbents! That's why Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are making him their TOP target for defeat. They launched a brand-new attack ad to smear Raphael's record – and you can bet they'll be mobilizing their shady megadonors to spend MILLIONS more to flip this seat red. Raphael is the moral warrior we need to keep Georgia blue, defend our Senate majority and pass our bold, progressive agenda. But with time running out before our critical deadline, we're still falling dangerously short of the resources we need to fight back against these vicious attack ads and win this race. Derek, with the Senate split 50-50, there is NO room for error – and hitting critical fundraising goals like this could mean all the difference between winning and losing. So with our midnight deadline rapidly approaching, we have to ask: Thanks for chipping in when we need it most. – Team Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Elora Tshibaka
subject: It’s my mom’s birthday!

My name is Elora and my mom is Kelly Tshibaka.
My mom has been working really hard to become our next Senator here in Alaska. She even got to meet President Trump! So for her birthday we wanted to give her a really cool gift.
**My brothers and sister wanted to ask if you could please chip in and support her campaign to help celebrate her birthday this weekend?**

She even got to meet President Trump! So for her birthday we wanted to give her a really cool gift. My brothers and sister wanted to ask if you could please chip in and support her campaign to help celebrate her birthday this weekend? Thank you so much for your help! And Happy Birthday, Mom! Thanks, | | | | ==

name: Mayor John Cranley
subject: Some things are bigger than us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time for real criminal justice reform. | Friend - **Some things are bigger than us.** I believe that’s how we lead a meaningful life - by working for something bigger than us. That means trying to right wrongs, wherever we find them. It means giving a voice to the voiceless. **That’s why I co-founded the Ohio Innocence Project.** The goal of the Ohio Innocence Project is simple: to free every person in Ohio who has been convicted of a crime that they didn’t commit. Since 2003, the Ohio Innocence Project has helped free 33 wrongfully convicted Ohioans, who collectively served nearly 650 years behind bars. **_[Friend, I want to continue this work as Governor. Sign on now to support my plan for real criminal justice reform>>>](https://act.johncranley.com/a/criminal-justice-reform?contactdata=IHK4V4EngiHGxKwnn%2FsUCkoNCc0NOEQwSnFPHJcI0tNo%2BN4yxy5REiRlzZ75as6q%2BZgfTPWYjsMg4%2FxRviBJHVzM7wTAjpTZ3JOBLUE%2B89PYUuMawheCWvy7I7yFNcn5S5AIdGhmKNRcLtrLbcFiLA%3D%3D)_** **Criminal justice reform is one of my top priorities.** Ohio needs a system that is truly fair and offers equal protection under the law. My plan focuses on addressing poverty and mental illnesses, establishes a special office to investigate wrongful convictions, reform prosecution practices that lead to wrongful convictions, help police departments obtain body cameras and increase police accountability, and invest in jobs, housing, and services for returning citizens. And last but not least, it’s time for Ohio to legalize marijuana. **_[Add your name to support my plan for criminal justice reform>>>](https://act.johncranley.com/a/criminal-justice-reform?contactdata=IHK4V4EngiHGxKwnn%2FsUCkoNCc0NOEQwSnFPHJcI0tNo%2BN4yxy5REiRlzZ75as6q%2BZgfTPWYjsMg4%2FxRviBJHVzM7wTAjpTZ3JOBLUE%2B89PYUuMawheCWvy7I7yFNcn5S5AIdGhmKNRcLtrLbcFiLA%3D%3D)_** Thank you for standing with me. Mayor John Cranley **[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35256242/304513929/-1406512299?refcode=em_JC_PET_RESEND-InnocenceProject_090521_endbutton&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzlmMGVjMC01NTBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_iwOTEaYWiEmtuPCIvibRlBVtKAYMtee12avKcIiLg=)**
---
John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: It’s time for real criminal justice reform. | Friend - Some things are bigger than us. I believe that’s how we lead a meaningful life - by working for something bigger than us. That means trying to right wrongs, wherever we find them. It means giving a voice to the voiceless. That’s why I co-founded the Ohio Innocence Project. The goal of the Ohio Innocence Project is simple: to free every person in Ohio who has been convicted of a crime that they didn’t commit. Since 2003, the Ohio Innocence Project has helped free 33 wrongfully convicted Ohioans, who collectively served nearly 650 years behind bars. Criminal justice reform is one of my top priorities. Ohio needs a system that is truly fair and offers equal protection under the law. My plan focuses on addressing poverty and mental illnesses, establishes a special office to investigate wrongful convictions, reform prosecution practices that lead to wrongful convictions, help police departments obtain body cameras and increase police accountability, and invest in jobs, housing, and services for returning citizens. And last but not least, it’s time for Ohio to legalize marijuana. Thank you for standing with me. Mayor John Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Erica Smith
subject: This is a little awkward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m writing to you from the side of Route 85 with an urgent request.
#
Hey, it's Erica.
I feel pretty awkward about this.
But I’m writing to you from the side of Route 85 with an urgent request.
**Believe it or not, our old campaign van just broke down!**
Yes, that’s correct. I am currently sitting in a rusty campaign van on Route 85, just outside Kannapolis, North Carolina!
Some friends of mine are on their way to come rescue me. **But bringing our van into the repair shop is going to be a HUGE and UNEXPECTED campaign expense this month.**
Y'all, this van is how we get around North Carolina, criss-crossing the state to meet every voter. I really need your help getting our campaign van back up and running ASAP to continue our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_ this weekend, so I am humbly asking:
[**_Can you please rush a donation of any amount to help me pay for van repair costs? I’m in a real pinch on the side of Route 85 right now, so $10, $5, or even $3 will go a long way in helping me get out of this situation._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13805?refcode=em20210905-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=417%2E3698%2E-kC0We)
**[Donate Now](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13805?refcode=em20210905-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=417%2E3698%2E-kC0We)**
Thank you SO MUCH for your support!
— Erica ❤️
P.S. Here’s what the van used to look like when it was in tip-top shape. [**_Can you chip in $10, $5, or even $3 to help cover repair costs?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13805?refcode=em20210905-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=417%2E3698%2E-kC0We)
[**__**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13805?refcode=em20210905-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=417%2E3698%2E-kC0We)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210905-417-footer&t=5&refcode2=417_3698_-kC0We&akid=417%2E3698%2E-kC0We)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

subject: A new poll shows Maggie down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Did you see the news, friend? **A new poll shows Senator Hassan trailing an anti-choice Republican.** With _Roe v. Wade_ hanging on by a thread, the last thing the Senate needs is another Mitch McConnell puppet. Across the country, including in New Hampshire, Republican-led legislatures are restricting access to women's health care, like contraception, cancer screenings, and abortion. The Supreme Court rejected an emergency request to block an extreme six-week abortion ban in Texas. **This ban is a devastating blow to women's reproductive freedom and will have dangerous consequences across the country.** Nobody has done more to help dismantle _Roe_ than Mitch McConnell. **By confirming three anti-choice justices to the Supreme Court, McConnell has all but cemented an anti-choice majority.** Senators like Maggie Hassan are working to fight back. Senator Hassan believes that all women have a constitutionally protected right to choose if and when to start a family -- and she helped introduce the Women’s Health Protection Act to guarantee the right to access an abortion. But right now, Maggie is down in the polls. clean_body: | | | Did you see the news, friend? A new poll shows Senator Hassan trailing an anti-choice Republican. With Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, the last thing the Senate needs is another Mitch McConnell puppet. Across the country, including in New Hampshire, Republican-led legislatures are restricting access to women's health care, like contraception, cancer screenings, and abortion. The Supreme Court rejected an emergency request to block an extreme six-week abortion ban in Texas. This ban is a devastating blow to women's reproductive freedom and will have dangerous consequences across the country. Nobody has done more to help dismantle Roe than Mitch McConnell. By confirming three anti-choice justices to the Supreme Court, McConnell has all but cemented an anti-choice majority. Senators like Maggie Hassan are working to fight back. Senator Hassan believes that all women have a constitutionally protected right to choose if and when to start a family -- and she helped introduce the Women’s Health Protection Act to guarantee the right to access an abortion. But right now, Maggie is down in the polls. With so much at stake in 2022, we can't afford to fall behind. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you so much for helping defend our Senate majority. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

Now, it’s up to us to win back the House and Senate Majorities and Stop Joe Biden’s march towards socialism. _Can we count on your support, Peter?_ ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ID_zY5G8o3YNoeszBlfMCm0W_cHOFnnvD6xmdK49vx3OL37YwAi6zgJDOValfT94ve_DHdORBdRuG1InMPvjvRbkZ7HOMYXOxbE_XsLV6alw-CqHpwsqJbldKLdeBqsTs5V2Cc2APZH_ZUwQQb7S04mn_QpmK32p7LPS-IqQ1bgOCoGzv3gzOH1azBq60gt8&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=841694121308137763_p&n=11) | | [Contribute Now](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ID_zY5G8o3YNoeszBlfMCm0W_cHOFnnvD6xmdK49vx2dhjFmsvrRPyEouXBg56jPwsYuBuFrbssgw1Ea3sff-m5Axed-xLzCCEIQ9h9TvW3ZKu25A3stZ-mRCxeZF5T5mb1VbtZ-xuqezfd-Q7IQk7zSprETwxXsBMXRdQMlhH9F2aLM4AwO7sTD5cSFpkHY&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=841694121308137763_p&n=12)

We know we email you a lot, Peter. That’s because we rely on the support of Grassroots Republicans like you to sustain our efforts! The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us, and we can’t afford to let them win. The best way you can help is [1] by subscribing to our emails and text messages and [2] by chipping in a few dollars as often as you can. We appreciate you!
Text JOIN to 21011 to receive mobile alerts and help the NCGOP! Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&data rates may apply. Terms and Conditions at [21011-info.com](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=r6rcTiCaq6j7Lcgrzw4K17041lLwyHYaLS1Xg9Z7-WE&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=841694121308137763_p&n=13).

And make no mistake: the Democrats are prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win. | | | | | Thank you. \-- North Carolina Republican Party

| | Peter, We just launched the biggest grassroots organizing campaign that Western North Carolina’s ever seen. We’re going to beat Madison Cawthorn by #Organizing _Everywhere_ \-- **and that means being on the ground in every single one of NC-11’s 17 counties.** As part of our #OrganizingEverywhere tour, I’m excited to share that I’ll be knocking doors in every county in NC-11 by the end of the year to connect personally with voters. I’ve knocked in two counties so far, with 15 more to go. At our September 18 Day of Action, we’ll be mobilizing folks across the district to join us for knocking. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35267509/304542319/-157601791?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210905_FR_EveryCounty_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=17&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc0MTI3Zi02ZDBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGjIN9X7b35QvvdNKqi08ctck96_af2GF0iPJMzbHF0=) [**Will you chip in $17 -- just $1 to support organizing efforts in each county -- to make sure we connect with every single voter we can?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35267510/304542320/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210905_FR_EveryCounty_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=17&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc0MTI3Zi02ZDBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGjIN9X7b35QvvdNKqi08ctck96_af2GF0iPJMzbHF0=) | | | [Chip in $17](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35267511/304542321/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210905_FR_EveryCounty_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=17&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc0MTI3Zi02ZDBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGjIN9X7b35QvvdNKqi08ctck96_af2GF0iPJMzbHF0=)
---
Some folks don’t think it’s worth it for Democrats to knock doors in “red” counties.
That goes against every principle of our campaign.
We believe that every voter matters and every conversation matters. Partisan labels do more to obscure and divide than anything else. We have common values and interests in our community -- the only question is if we can build the bridges to find them.
So how do you build those bridges? It starts with one conversation at a time, and with a whole lot of listening. As a minister, an organizer and an elected official, this kind of interaction is at the core of how I work. And it’s at the core of how we build relationships and create change.
It takes time, and means showing up again and again. It’s worth it and it works. _There’s a better way forward -- and we’re blazing that trail together._
[**Candidly, it also isn’t cheap. We need resources to mobilize our volunteers and keep up our momentum -- can I count on you to chip in $17 or more today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35267512/304542322/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210905_FR_EveryCounty_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=17&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc0MTI3Zi02ZDBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGjIN9X7b35QvvdNKqi08ctck96_af2GF0iPJMzbHF0=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, We just launched the biggest grassroots organizing campaign that Western North Carolina’s ever seen. We’re going to beat Madison Cawthorn by #Organizing Everywhere \-- and that means being on the ground in every single one of NC-11’s 17 counties. As part of our #OrganizingEverywhere tour, I’m excited to share that I’ll be knocking doors in every county in NC-11 by the end of the year to connect personally with voters. I’ve knocked in two counties so far, with 15 more to go. At our September 18 Day of Action, we’ll be mobilizing folks across the district to join us for knocking. = = | | | = Some folks don’t think it’s worth it for Democrats to knock doors in “red” counties. That goes against every principle of our campaign. We believe that every voter matters and every conversation matters. Partisan labels do more to obscure and divide than anything else. We have common values and interests in our community -- the only question is if we can build the bridges to find them. So how do you build those bridges? It starts with one conversation at a time, and with a whole lot of listening. As a minister, an organizer and an elected official, this kind of interaction is at the core of how I work. And it’s at the core of how we build relationships and create change. It takes time, and means showing up again and again. It’s worth it and it works. There’s a better way forward -- and we’re blazing that trail together. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

body:
Let me explain

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35268690/304545699/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDU1NDQxNi03MzBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otqE--j7cj-u4mXgbk4k9EvxaCegTJVNYbjoHDn8e4o=)

Hey Peter, this is Rep. Mark Takano. I’m reaching out because I have a really important favor to ask you.

[**Can you chip in just $1 (that's not a mistake or a typo) to our progressive movement right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35268696/304545706/446234574?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=MTFC_20210905_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDU1NDQxNi03MzBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otqE--j7cj-u4mXgbk4k9EvxaCegTJVNYbjoHDn8e4o=)

Let me explain:

From the start, this campaign was built by grassroots activists and everyday Americans who stepped up in small but important ways to help elect a gay, Japanese-American, teacher, and progressive (me!) to Congress.

Since then, you all have helped me accomplish so much -- we’ve fought for LGBTQ+ rights, stood up to MAGA extremism, and championed veterans’ well-being.

To this day, this movement and everything we’ve worked for has continued to rely on small-dollar donors like YOU, Peter -- not big Super PACs and billionaires like so many of my counterparts in the GOP.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Thank you, workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I believe that when workers succeed, businesses succeed, and our economy succeeds.
#
Peter,
I believe that when workers succeed, businesses succeed, and our economy succeeds.
In the Senate, I am focused on making progress on critical policies to support working families -- like raising the minimum wage, protecting the right to organize, national paid leave, and more.
**[Are you with me in the fight for workers’ rights, Peter? Add your name right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35271283/304554252/-521495339?ms=pm_em_210905_1&refcode=pm_em_210905_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGI0NjYyZS03YzBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcQUjsqB6ncrK4mk1-6PX00VbLUmrAb7EEusiRNxswM=&emci=ea1a190f-680e-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=30b4662e-7c0e-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=13116610)**
This Labor Day weekend, I want to thank all of the working people -- from our health care workers to delivery drivers -- who have continued to go above and beyond during this pandemic.
Know I have your back in the other Washington and I’ll keep fighting for you every single day.
Thank you,
Patty

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 6 years ago, I thwarted a terrorist attack
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
As a soldier, I was trained to take out terrorist threats -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I am in the world. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=aead1846f7df404da06eb0ed28464338&_e=HaeLEHBrFFCPDZrUrJhLobD5m7QQUe3NCZyF1ZktlslzseDYoNO7qegW6LFVRyCQgq5tL3Fnperdl6e3nb_YTgD5ONmnziG6l2uvA1k4jpMz5AK1VtWDxsAM_oGvQH05BSWSXvIihFnLIfWVxJIB1xUVlS1fj-S3vV0j5gCedAc_x__yXvWQVEdx_ZAH0hVP8QIRXYltPmk8i5cgXbC9mLjwh5QM7nyMI38LtD4MVt_OrPEz654zMoOkuhWyZ9LVnHWZtBu_WOB2JeQ5yOleA9fLckTvphV1wKj5hCxnXBRpp4vNDgmhwJqeUtYDHiEtVVnGTjJAZ33q0hU9Fpo-Tu6EA54QNJA7PxZf55bODp1w4VRYPz2rdiqA-vhgiJTD7zJLeA1jpaJyrbNrYsdb_sQg-lDUs-gT1l2_lnW6yMfy94fkuUPUJhanalqknQUdiTygv5ONI2yMFJq8ww8PSA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=aead1846f7df404da06eb0ed28464338&_e=HaeLEHBrFFCPDZrUrJhLobD5m7QQUe3NCZyF1ZktlslzseDYoNO7qegW6LFVRyCQgq5tL3Fnperdl6e3nb_YTgD5ONmnziG6l2uvA1k4jpMz5AK1VtWDxsAM_oGvQH05BSWSXvIihFnLIfWVxJIB1xUVlS1fj-S3vV0j5gCedAc_x__yXvWQVEdx_ZAH0hVP8QIRXYltPmk8i5cgXbC9mLjwh5QM7nyMI38LtD4MVt_OrPEz654zMoOkuhWyZ9LVbg9-7bAWk_SFfF1W_3nAeE95VRdPXoY18u6PQa8eEKjeZ9SKoY8kE5HGh_TX1gw8WBkmwWqUN0rx9Nj24f10V26INd_tPU7r-SClJJ2xEtbHlEzi-jvB1bDDPfi94GPphqFrdrJK2BeS4BEg3rY2vpo8hp8SitpKvFruYojOI642RazlyhMhC95eC3mElTKfpwzZr5I3S45tOBO8KLgzEw%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=aead1846f7df404da06eb0ed28464338&_e=HaeLEHBrFFCPDZrUrJhLobD5m7QQUe3NCZyF1ZktlslzseDYoNO7qegW6LFVRyCQgq5tL3Fnperdl6e3nb_YTgD5ONmnziG6l2uvA1k4jpMz5AK1VtWDxsAM_oGvQH05BSWSXvIihFnLIfWVxJIB1xUVlS1fj-S3vV0j5gCedAc_x__yXvWQVEdx_ZAH0hVP8QIRXYltPmk8i5cgXbC9mLjwh5QM7nyMI38LtD4MVt_OrPEz654zMoOkuhWyZ9LVoQ_tdn5qCUQA__iAq39raf-NUZ0mKdStsUn8VHzFHpxzhtuZ3f5p6BDGMP24ZrAQsCQAuE2zkvWzBKcmIHyF2OUKrCf1LBkUd0ED3XfYLuIXRayYqDBHWU5BM8ceS2Elc-0cxHvLs6F32SowjuWebP6U7Dhp3yBgGpbUc1lUjeDnPIPPYTJ-muzGyYWvjc4_kDT88RP5vu3CfxthqCe2VA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=aead1846f7df404da06eb0ed28464338&_e=HaeLEHBrFFCPDZrUrJhLobD5m7QQUe3NCZyF1ZktlslzseDYoNO7qegW6LFVRyCQgq5tL3Fnperdl6e3nb_YTgD5ONmnziG6l2uvA1k4jpMz5AK1VtWDxsAM_oGvQH05BSWSXvIihFnLIfWVxJIB1xUVlS1fj-S3vV0j5gCedAc_x__yXvWQVEdx_ZAH0hVP8QIRXYltPmk8i5cgXbC9mLjwh5QM7nyMI38LtD4MVt_OrPEz654zMoOkuhWyZ9LV9KuEFgYfZAc1OiNk9dXHPxvPx1SrVFnsCzzASQaw8O1Kh8-wsKu9ppdZle-XaN5GyrMOTy-ICu_Lv9O0NI-FCYvdRbRZ7qsinoMZePWXLJqPZ4ZrmIhZguVHNm_ppgvEWiEUl7lv7lF2hTQ89QqQTsl1D1HkiJ8H9btklchD5DuaiZ7M_Wj_cGeozJZxWlN4tmprwtRwF0RijTEiT-DC7w%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=aead1846f7df404da06eb0ed28464338&_e=HaeLEHBrFFCPDZrUrJhLobD5m7QQUe3NCZyF1ZktlslzseDYoNO7qegW6LFVRyCQgq5tL3Fnperdl6e3nb_YTgD5ONmnziG6l2uvA1k4jpMz5AK1VtWDxsAM_oGvQH05BSWSXvIihFnLIfWVxJIB1xUVlS1fj-S3vV0j5gCedAc_x__yXvWQVEdx_ZAH0hVP8QIRXYltPmk8i5cgXbC9mLjwh5QM7nyMI38LtD4MVt_OrPEz654zMoOkuhWyZ9LVMXpbTO38DQpWAOiOFBHV_BpnWobGl_xeyqUvgMlNLZDJc9AgJz8GHJ1my7icAcU9kwHmjqMdatnJsWi12ynOyT31jCBxjubBX5NtuAgBi51n4Z5nl9SMpZUwfoCo40HnEDN4tshJAVtCaBHrWoPX5qyd9ONllcgO15EtwLId_m83cL8iAEsnoX26A7tfkC34hlci6Lys5ACt7KlH93l1qQ%3D%3D)

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Why today? Give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Everyone will be watching. And a BIG NUMBER has the chance to make some people think twice about spending big to beat us. That’s critical.
#

Why today?
Why, out of all of the fundraising emails our campaign sends, should you give today?
Well, give us a chance to explain:
This month’s official FEC fundraising deadline is the most important of the campaign.
First, when it’s over, Mark is legally required to report how much money he has raised, and we will also report the number of donations we’ve received.
Everyone will be watching. And a BIG NUMBER has the chance to make some people think twice about spending big to beat us. That’s critical.
So that’s why it’s so important for you to give today. Because we need to start this month off in a big way before our deadline. And it’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today? We are heading towards the most important, official FEC deadline of this campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210905-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1277_6688874_8UHAbH&akid=1277%2E6688874%2E8UHAbH)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210905-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1277_6688874_8UHAbH&akid=1277%2E6688874%2E8UHAbH)**
Full speed ahead,
\- Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1277%2E6688874%2E8UHAbH).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: My priorities in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
>From acting on climate change to investing in our workers and our economic future with paid leave and affordable child care, to fixing our broken immigration system and protecting voting rights -- I will be working to ensure that the Senate moves these priorities past the finish line.
#
Team,
The Senate will be back in session next week -- and we’ve got our work cut out for us.
From acting on climate change to investing in our workers and our economic future with paid leave and affordable child care, to fixing our broken immigration system and protecting voting rights -- I will be working to ensure that the Senate moves these priorities past the finish line.
**[Right now, the biggest obstacle to making our government work for the American people?_The Senate GOP’s obstruction._ Will you add your name to tell the Republicans to work with us on these issues -- or get out of the way? Sign the petition right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35274385/304565611/1896075771?ms=jr_em_nd_210905_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_210905_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmQxYzU2YS04YzBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RU3VdUiUUJ7JwpiZi8pxVPtqdKi0Kp-xmSrIrqZK3Pc=&emci=2ebcd4f1-720e-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1bd1c56a-8c0e-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=3800590)**
While I have always been willing to work across the aisle with reasonable Republicans, Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have become infamous for their do-nothing obstruction tactics.
My governing philosophy is that we agree where we can and fight where we must -- and advancing issues like voting rights and immigration reform are some areas we need to fight.
**[Are you with me? clean_body: From acting on climate change to investing in our workers and our economic future with paid leave and affordable child care, to fixing our broken immigration system and protecting voting rights -- I will be working to ensure that the Senate moves these priorities past the finish line. Team, The Senate will be back in session next week -- and we’ve got our work cut out for us. From acting on climate change to investing in our workers and our economic future with paid leave and affordable child care, to fixing our broken immigration system and protecting voting rights -- I will be working to ensure that the Senate moves these priorities past the finish line. While I have always been willing to work across the aisle with reasonable Republicans, Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have become infamous for their do-nothing obstruction tactics. My governing philosophy is that we agree where we can and fight where we must -- and advancing issues like voting rights and immigration reform are some areas we need to fight. Thank you, Jacky

body:

That was all before Donald Trump threw his “complete and total endorsement” behind my extremist opponent — one of his top allies who pushed voter fraud conspiracy theories to overturn the results of Nevada's election.**

Even worse, more than $1 million has already been spent on attack ads to defeat me — and the recent downgrade for my odds of winning prove that the GOP’s tactics could be working. **Derek, the Republican Senate campaign arm just raised a staggering $28 million.**

**[That’s millions they could pour into Nevada at any moment to defeat me and flip the Senate. name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: The very definition of insanity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
You won't believe what's happening in Washington. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/insanity-2472854?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3a24a35856&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

We have hundreds of thousands of unvetted, possibly dangerous illegal aliens crossing our border every month.

We are about to have a FLOOD of refugees from Afghanistan.

And do you know what our government is doing?

It is giving work visas to illegal aliens with deportation orders.

_That is the definition of insanity_ \-- and when I found out about it, even I couldn't believe that the federal government could be so stupid.

So I introduced a bill -- The Americans not Aliens Act to end this ridiculous practice, and stop giving illegal aliens MORE incentive to cross our borders:

[__](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4e5e50279b&e=645b3b1338)

They already have plenty of incentive as it is, with the Biden Administration waving them across without question.

I need your help to end yet another foolish government program.

[**Show me you have my back with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c16a505d73&e=645b3b1338).

[**Anything you can chip in will help me end the Biden Administration's reckless border policies**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8d7d8543e9&e=645b3b1338).

We shouldn't be allowing illegal aliens to cross our borders in the first place.

We certainly shouldn't be giving them work visas!

And we DEFINITELY shouldn't be giving work visas to illegal aliens who are about to be deported!

What is the Biden Administration thinking? The answer is: _it's thinking only about how it can help foreigners, not Americans_.

[**With your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, I can keep working to put America First in Congress**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8f3a1c17ad&e=645b3b1338).

Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45571575&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MTE2MjAzMAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: Roger Misso
subject: Are you a veteran? We're here to listen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

The past three weeks have been pretty rough on the veterans community. From the Kabul airport to our own VA centers, veterans are doing their best to stay strong.

As we recover together, we recognize how important it is to listen. [_**So we want to provide a space for you to say what 's on your mind, let us know how you're doing, and what work you'd like to see our country focus on moving forward.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/GpPLTSqkD8LcahriPoH4lR00xjLlVOcboDj64rVJBRo=/9qgfWCAdVBL_FcmbwBSiW9gpXQwLutrGqhtGK2r6Jys=?usp=sf_link)

We will keep your responses confidential (unless you check "Yes" in the box "Is it OK to reach out to you about your responses?"). Our plan is to send a white paper to the Biden administration outlining the voices and concerns of veterans like you, and how we can move forward together as a nation (but again, you will not be personally identified unless you let us know you want to be).

[_**This is the link to tell us how you 're doing and what you're thinking.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/GpPLTSqkD8LcahriPoH4lR00xjLlVOcboDj64rVJBRo=/9qgfWCAdVBL_FcmbwBSiW9gpXQwLutrGqhtGK2r6Jys=?usp=sf_link) Please note that, while we will keep your responses confidential, the best place to go if you are in crisis or distress is always your local VA hospital. Contact the Veterans Crisis Line at 1-800-273-8255 (Press 1) or by text at 838255. For emergency mental health care, you can also go directly to your local VA medical center 24/7 regardless of your discharge status or enrollment in other VA care.

If you'd like to support our efforts to advance veterans issues in Congress and elect leaders of integrity to the House and Senate, [_**you can chip in here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/GpPLTSqkD8LcahriPoH4lR00xjLlVOcboDj64rVJBRo=/YkZRIsi1VZkKkFi_KEslINLV30580CiujZbl0rv4CbY=) Every little bit helps.

We appreciate each and every single one of you! Please take care of yourselves.

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director_
_Taking the Hill_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/GpPLTSqkD8LcahriPoH4lR00xjLlVOcboDj64rVJBRo=/lRMWjeuAzkXOFJkM472OdAyx6xy6fUy0LZ6MC80AHQ4=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/GpPLTSqkD8LcahriPoH4lR00xjLlVOcboDj64rVJBRo=/IcEdbtg6ro7h88TfrvRvCtxV-U6j-pKnvj_Yp2zxMJY= "https://act.myngp.com/el/GpPLTSqkD8LcahriPoH4lR00xjLlVOcboDj64rVJBRo=/IcEdbtg6ro7h88TfrvRvCtxV-U6j-pKnvj_Yp2zxMJY=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Tim Ryan
subject: everyone loves an underdog
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=766%2E3611125%2Ez0iSDa ][IMG]

Hello,

Today, I get to throw out the first pitch for the Akron RubberDucks (yes,
that’s their real name). Brady and I have been practicing in the backyard
and I’m ready to show off my skills.

When I was a kid, playing little league taught me a lot about hard work,
determination, and never giving up the fight. It also taught me that you
can win even if the odds are stacked against you -- as long as you play
smart.

You see, Mitch McConnell is putting all of his wealthy friends up to bat.
A new report found that several of my GOP opponents are
multi-millionaires. And Trump billionaire Peter Thiel has already poured
in $10 million to support J.D. Vance.

Look, everyone loves an underdog. I believe we can beat the
odds, flip Ohio blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority with you
on our team. But right now, it’s the top of the third and we’re behind our
weekly goal, so I’m asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2451?t=1007&akid=766%2E3611125%2Ez0iSDa ]Will you pitch in $10 or more today to help our team lay the groundwork
for victory? Your donation has a direct impact on our success in the weeks
and months ahead. I hope I can count on you.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2451?t=1008&akid=766%2E3611125%2Ez0iSDa ]Donate

This campaign is fueled by hardworking people chipping in what they can
when they can to make a difference for a movement we all believe in.
That’s why I’m depending on your grassroots contribution today.

Let’s strike ‘em out.

— Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=766%2E3611125%2Ez0iSDa ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=766%2E3611125%2Ez0iSDa ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

Niles, Ohio 44446

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: this will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
I know it’s a holiday weekend
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35278626/304576259/-2023814932?refcode=20210905.5_TM_9AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWU4ZTIyYi1hMTBlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CL1Zvxk4x--TMtBKYz_gWuWMn4DMDSEa4SvPb1fgUM=)

| | I know it’s a holiday weekend, Derek, so this will only take one minute of your time.

**The race for Virginia Governor is the most important in the country this year.**

We worked tirelessly to defeat Donald Trump last year and fight for a future that works for all Americans. And now, that progress is in jeopardy.

I’m running against someone who Donald Trump likes so much, he endorsed him three times. And what’s more, the race is shockingly close, Derek. A recent poll has the race exactly tied.

So if we don’t double down on our efforts in the final two months of this campaign, we can kiss Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to a Trump comeback.

clean_body: I know it’s a holiday weekend | | | = | | I know it’s a holiday weekend, Derek, so this will only take one minute of your time. The race for Virginia Governor is the most important in the country this year. We worked tirelessly to defeat Donald Trump last year and fight for a future that works for all Americans. And now, that progress is in jeopardy. I’m running against someone who Donald Trump likes so much, he endorsed him three times. And what’s more, the race is shockingly close, Derek. A recent poll has the race exactly tied. So if we don’t double down on our efforts in the final two months of this campaign, we can kiss Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to a Trump comeback. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, we’ll be able to win this race and keep making progress for Virginians. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Marking 6 years since I looked a terrorist in the eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC0HKPDYsSmOU7AoL7zgz0q6E0L181mDLBW_jrpGyQbJAQWF7FjxNPk0DrdQdOqI-013BKUi0gtc3_1IACjlMe-s0lkSoAqd4TIRsjxGFdBPZXVlzS8s35hIUqe_64LXL_SBdWRREwbU8RH40OZAOVBfpiYttig-nT5GJ1lmK7LuIoRPJ_SS8bH4opgZ7XarHpDk13LCNo37SgEYBSt7YsW9w%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC0XqEHz0iKY5B_Fed1N0sh08LTLL-sOrhgnjins5HRaHsEaprEA8ThLj7tdQ17MsHXwGeJFZGrOKPyZPfXd6-svA7mUWSg_glN9996xdn9es0sNhIjw5t0WIUBmv54nvKGoXB_zp_Kt-_DKZnv_0UTWeW9b3h-U9Bxu5mPQwkkfMU4q3BRUWu1QiuAW86jvYUI8fSdZovMknrna1oWSu6M2Q%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC0lW9BStHNsvy0_94dG6ueMDf5MeRML2TTd6gplLGvuZPGhD41b0DOs3teJe41DuX65jf9_W6yLopbUychWavnTzTPCxwl6SBvLWVebvg-dfquBdSFCse3u1gYEAn2bA2tlncnu8J8jh1P468ukpaG15how4axe6ki1TQVp5-bbmtKwg2d9lZAlR4AJgSSztZpZys8Gg95BSySQt9dGxxPnQ%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC0oz2G3am023kGLJTcm56CT3pREvvcJ0i9jtLpxynKa-BMvBxItq6q0scUHNLSQoa5tTez0S_edoy-mk2wtCv7n0B-W3wCKmFaCAEweSX1TsoNh2Pf9GIEEhsjq1n_l84sbNsVhEM9DkX24NmUR63s24u_d-10fBEIMghKtLpC06QnR5F_iDv38XSP40aeJqA9wgJwTU-0qJSnuWIlZ0JmUg%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC0e9y9pR2eJ0eRyl9vxGr6aGzTVOfywIq8xlW62ahwplZQhio5wggYPw-3c9vurjXW98dfpuEVegT_v8eqVL2M3HyHtXtcDpndAFFoTCwrUgKHQ6OhXg24FHxQss9NGclf3xMy1bZfZSVE912vvbWuSBzvAIMn2W8A3AF_1a00oG3Si0EC7COtQ9eoRaqcfSLn8PiWOTNfUgyToWDIC_U8gA%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC04ufKG6gJpvc1OOd1PpBa0-v8XuJ1hdjjnKe0io8jHcIVaxKgNHMbTbbGJr0ADgo7xSjUr47tZBtLGsp3S5ARYTnwtWcti9UO9e8xaF7ODgGTDYPAg5haP27DWGiXwjv7-guoaM4alTPKhinSxfvPSXDI87U1KsAvjF9WBVrbk1SvbqJt0Aov-w-7-JrDkwCIXKC39fDztZiUZPQgTtBxsA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=78677da0617b48ac8a6d46d5c58333ba&_e=kXngAoXXOYV_RZgxgM-H85-iQtA0Xun7R2_qAtgFL7EVAxNtBr5Qu7ZPlNtt3Z-X0qXm4myJwL-m395X51VddTfJFCBC-9qm-j1BsyjfJC9SlwDsrzn_Ji6JbMTwQA00vW8-dZip3admtl9KUTKsTtJ2KE4dyCZZDfQNif-t6Cj8yOty_juoy_TgENzK-wDs5g4PPYauh4hAT6MfvvaFSNT_8XgRbZPQGwDVaLXshidv5nTj2U_C1ZDgxwbauwC04pD4ISbwVjhlQhrp0ErvjSsN3CT6Tq9IH6vahdr63GlI3zmsyQXix-iA55fpAclu2Y43IfEtpB3V23sE8YfcBZ7K7jxH7-0d1-q8b3Eo9JWJ6OhkyrTrGV3K9PTleeOKu-1bNTdEKZ9H7G945Zbzt33v6FjlG3d7AWhcwXClTew54A9YoapqqVo6dx15VitsrAedueY8cYIRmWUIAIfrAA%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: 15 million matter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
That's how many are unaccounted for |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d8bb3a7d7d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

Word just in – about 15 million mail in ballots were unaccounted for in the 2020 Presidential election.

This is unacceptable. And I’m here to stand up for election integrity in one of the key swing states in which FRAUD ousted our rightful President.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona and am the vanguard leading the charge in the fight for election integrity in Arizona, in the greatest grassroots movement of the millennium! And now I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona. **

**_I paid for important hearings out of pocket when no one else would pay for them. I listened when others covered their ears and I spoke up when others stayed silent._**

[_Please donate today to stand up for election integrity in Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0aaa7c57c0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=af98279c6c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| If you are done with the propaganda from those who stole the election – it’s time to stand up and speak out.

“Safest and most secure?” That is absurd.

In fact, the Public Interest Legal Foundation delivered a research brief highlighting a few key findings regarding the 2020 election.

In particular:
* In 2020, there were 90.6 million ballots sent
* Of these 90.6 million ballots, 1.1 million were undeliverable
* 560,814 were rejected
* 14.7 million were “unknown.”

**These numbers don’t mean anything without additional clarity, so let me quote the brief directly on its definition of “unknown”**

_The U.S. Election Assistance Commission asks local officials how many ballots were not returned as voted, were undeliverable, or were otherwise “unable to be tracked.” The USPS Inspector General most recently reported that only 13 percent of mail ballots in the 2018 General Election used the official tracking system. This means there is a wide variety of things that can happen to a ballot in the “unknown” column. A ballot can be put in the wrong mailbox and land in an unfriendly neighbor’s trash. It can be thrown out with your unpaid bills. It can be left outside for the wind to carry the last mile (like seen in Nevada in 2020). Election officials simply do not know what happened. Unknown ballots are the greatest blind spot in the American electoral system._

**It should be noted that there were only 5.9 million ballots that were “unknown” in 2016, in which President Trump rightfully won.**

Let’s do some math. There was about a 117% increase in the number of ballots sent out. There was a **__149%__** increase in the number of ballots that were “unknown” and could have ended up in the wrong mailbox or the trash.

Folks, it doesn’t take a genius to do the math. It takes a pen and paper.

**_And when we are talking fraud, we are talking about only needing a small number of fraudulent votes for the Democrats to be CRIMINALS. Heck, even one would do the job._**

And the Democrats are pushing to increase the number of mail in ballots and voter fraud even further.

**In fact, the President of the Public Interest Legal Foundation issued the following statement:**

_“These figures detail how the 2020 push to mail voting needs to be a one-year experiment. Bills like H.R.1/S.1 risk inflating these numbers even further, pushing our election system toward error, disenfranchisement and ultimately widespread doubt about election outcomes. Some of the counties with the least experience in administering mail voting rejected the most ballots nationwide. If continued, 2020-style chaos will become the norm.”_

Think about that.

**If we let the Democrats continue down this path, and we let them bully us, and we let them call us conspiracy theorists and nutjobs, then they have already won. _“2020-style chaos will become the norm.”_**

I don’t know about you, but I got the pen in my hand and I did the math. It’s up for the Democrats to prove millions of Americans wrong, and that there was NO fraud in the 2020 election!
---
| ***Join the #ProveIt movement***
My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud patriot, conservative, and supporter of Donald Trump. I have fought for election integrity from day one. And every day we see that the brand of election integrity grows stronger and the Fake News Media gets more scared.

**_[But we cannot do it without your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=141552a472&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[_Please donate TODAY to make a stand against the Democrats, and stand up for our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eb98166dcc&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9e86f78847&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b76a13193f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=2f830a08d5) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=2f830a08d5).
---

subject: Take Back the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
If we lose more seats, it’ll only be worse

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f517c94658a34b3b88f7fec01c257b13&_e=lsrwzvXCEFviaVaNYMA0EMhjAQDTT9hKJjJmqhUeCUaS1kq0eDIeoiP9tgi0Gks2l-W2eIFEGPMGJ7RaCN9c2ooTwjkJon5i3rtz1UfeBwWbKjjNNjlv4g2ExVBOV0Gup3d5IThSnWVB2Kui23eOh3GBFlXaOXBriLeBikip6hPXZZY4urS40qjuqIIfa0WgxanyEjLo8G3AWIWNYtyKTTqnaDfmz7cWRdlXk7M-lNA5GcUQmsKzNp4sXTCwhsWRFb6CFGSXwtzODlDIKQP7h4A623A_9wgYAbdCEh6qcVY5nlsTxm4AGvHqGl-6qBaKvVPIIHJLkJguXtzFcf5tMjgYpb7Bry00yc_yY7BlzQ1UMO7Ic0fTfwcb6gd3Y6Q7tmEq5xGJNgzE3Nv4DYQoy_HGdpS6Of_-VkxYN5VYTkPx7a_5Ry5ozwWzRgNEzRaRTWSaYaUeJYwAV8FY-Mkbh8cC22CFrCO-gdFdUXe6Hl38Hw__8K6-95yaSeK15gLcD5aEFd182YzmNlY44WCjsg80Khs0XCiZ4WKcwhUKgfQ%3D)
---

Friend,

While Democrats have control of the House, they will work to advance their socialist policies: **tax us into oblivion, raise the national debt, impose critical race theory, open our borders, and force you to fund Medicare for all and abortion on demand.** Meanwhile, Republicans are working for conservative principles and policies that will help American families and give them freedom.

The only way we can do this is if we take back the House next year and keep Nancy Pelosi from maintaining her socialist grip on our nation.
| [**DONATE HERE TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f517c94658a34b3b88f7fec01c257b13&_e=lsrwzvXCEFviaVaNYMA0EMhjAQDTT9hKJjJmqhUeCUaS1kq0eDIeoiP9tgi0Gks2l-W2eIFEGPMGJ7RaCN9c2ooTwjkJon5i3rtz1UfeBwWbKjjNNjlv4g2ExVBOV0Gup3d5IThSnWVB2Kui23eOh3GBFlXaOXBriLeBikip6hPXZZY4urS40qjuqIIfa0WgxanyEjLo8G3AWIWNYtyKTTqnaDfmz7cWRdlXk7M-lNA5GcUQmsKzNp4sXTCwhsWRFb6CFGSXwtzODlDIKQP7h4A623A_9wgYAbdCEh6qcVY5nlsTxm4AGvHqGl-6qBaKvVPIIHJLkJguXtzFcf5tMtILOp4OeULU46t3ASbZDtggS-325WV94N9iy7r_popsVIXo9jFD82EmV96G8B58XIrFes6LBAPvjHhAN0kaGjmmlMd18AeZKyGMeBtCqAdpRYj19kiVJnQh2AFnu4IUqZWIYB-HXc5TB-U3-Nov-8pb5Zww4UG0hbOrZm_F59d5ZoAi6IFe4b38h4khtahvKpq4ax-9QVrlyu38N1geRHA%3D)
---

Since Joe Biden and his Democrat friends have come into power, we’ve faced rising prices across the country, trillion-dollar “infrastructure” bills, and an assault on our liberties. **If we lose more seats in the House, it’ll only be worse.** We’ve got to stand up to Pelosi’s poor policies and her “my way or the highway” mentality if we’re going to Take Back the House and save America from a socialist fate.

It’s crucial that we Take Back the House. We need to implement pro-business, pro-growth, and pro-America policies if we’re going to maintain conservative values and protect the American dream.
[**CHIP IN HERE TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f517c94658a34b3b88f7fec01c257b13&_e=lsrwzvXCEFviaVaNYMA0EMhjAQDTT9hKJjJmqhUeCUaS1kq0eDIeoiP9tgi0Gks2l-W2eIFEGPMGJ7RaCN9c2ooTwjkJon5i3rtz1UfeBwWbKjjNNjlv4g2ExVBOV0Gup3d5IThSnWVB2Kui23eOh3GBFlXaOXBriLeBikip6hPXZZY4urS40qjuqIIfa0WgxanyEjLo8G3AWIWNYtyKTTqnaDfmz7cWRdlXk7M-lNA5GcUQmsKzNp4sXTCwhsWRFb6CFGSXwtzODlDIKQP7h4A623A_9wgYAbdCEh6qcVY5nlsTxm4AGvHqGl-6qBaKvVPIIHJLkJguXtzFcf5tMsTPytcIHyd8P04pV56vHrAwrzyFi2Al1zo_d8ZF2WxmpFouiw1kBJj_tuza2-iJe2UfHlUgvwpJaxAO-nPi93IE2gL_vbKfOKZnvbot3InNYhhJG9IbanNgL171Z0xM1aoj8Nx8BLNOuAOrmPvBdQ2mt7juX_yuDY33AxV6LqrH5wvXE-G11rCM7BdM7EsS-qACGv465UoqQ25nfN4JqHE%3D)
---

We need more conservative leaders in the House to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and her radical cronies, but they’ve got to have the support of strong Republicans across the nation.

**_[Will you help us Take Back the House?](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f517c94658a34b3b88f7fec01c257b13&_e=lsrwzvXCEFviaVaNYMA0EMhjAQDTT9hKJjJmqhUeCUaS1kq0eDIeoiP9tgi0Gks2l-W2eIFEGPMGJ7RaCN9c2ooTwjkJon5i3rtz1UfeBwWbKjjNNjlv4g2ExVBOV0Gup3d5IThSnWVB2Kui23eOh3GBFlXaOXBriLeBikip6hPXZZY4urS40qjuqIIfa0WgxanyEjLo8G3AWIWNYtyKTTqnaDfmz7cWRdlXk7M-lNA5GcUQmsKzNp4sXTCwhsWRFb6CFGSXwtzODlDIKQP7h4A623A_9wgYAbdCEh6qcVY5nlsTxm4AGvHqGl-6qBaKvVPIIHJLkJguXtzFcf5tMiVmBkPCza4q81erYA6_KjdY7hzUXjkH347LlRtEJU3Yn8Z_6Q01yBnfER7R3t9nDC_sjpMvacWTm9VSSznJcqjDKz12c5o2kB_jg3KBJOFmVwaj6vWp_GZiaFDxHXzrXDlTRy3ePqYu5Eb11_Va0ZyxfZKvPcpe01bp6HkVYu6mExY1sLvhKkjHeD_CQhXfKbyI5YEKx7p6dVleY90FY1g%3D)_**

Thank you,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f517c94658a34b3b88f7fec01c257b13&_e=lsrwzvXCEFviaVaNYMA0EMhjAQDTT9hKJjJmqhUeCUaS1kq0eDIeoiP9tgi0Gks2l-W2eIFEGPMGJ7RaCN9c2ooTwjkJon5i3rtz1UfeBwWbKjjNNjlv4g2ExVBOV0Gup3d5IThSnWVB2Kui23eOh3GBFlXaOXBriLeBikip6hPXZZY4urS40qjuqIIfa0WgxanyEjLo8G3AWIWNYtyKTTqnaDfmz7cWRdlXk7M-lNA5GcUQmsKzNp4sXTCwhsWRFb6CFGSXwtzODlDIKQP7h4A623A_9wgYAbdCEh6qcVY5nlsTxm4AGvHqGl-6qBaKvVPIIHJLkJguXtzFcf5tMpIzUYePZpbANv2jEdpuK1EE9OtWVsBjsWROVtnz6l--HlMhVRMJLkhu6MmLHLemdluUVLRjd9LaI-Q4ZN0dyBQDCVj6jo6fx0VeKYYpI4hNYTZfxpdHvuobDOtGDLSWTtVVDJVf1TlcuT8WIy5PCBc3aClyMGq8OGd56MHgTfY-jtyfxSFGzpxjhc1NrT7dIrKg8d3oaoXoKzJkf4P1QTA%3D)

The only way we can do this is if we take back the House next year and keep Nancy Pelosi from maintaining her socialist grip on our nation. | Since Joe Biden and his Democrat friends have come into power, we’ve faced rising prices across the country, trillion-dollar “infrastructure” bills, and an assault on our liberties. If we lose more seats in the House, it’ll only be worse. We’ve got to stand up to Pelosi’s poor policies and her “my way or the highway” mentality if we’re going to Take Back the House and save America from a socialist fate. It’s crucial that we Take Back the House. We need to implement pro-business, pro-growth, and pro-America policies if we’re going to maintain conservative values and protect the American dream. We need more conservative leaders in the House to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and her radical cronies, but they’ve got to have the support of strong Republicans across the nation. Thank you, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. It all starts with this recall. The Left is scared that if Newsom gets recalled, the conservative wave will engulf the country. Thank you, Lou Barnett Campaign Manager Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee P.S. We only have days left to make sure conservatives to turn in their ballots, so your support right this second is more important than ever. | PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM Committee major funding from: Elder for Governor 2021 Geoff Palmer Saul Fox Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

I need YOU to be all in. This is un-American and unacceptable.
| [**I’M ALL IN**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=ad603bdc53eb48d984709614f05bcf30&_e=0UetEAT6uXLWn5ntKJ3yW6vWK8w9WGqndpE47G7y2gNe_SNClVR4MdTqkXpgqTFHrktVAfbRdSwc9WOKv7NZz6qkjiojvHJzwm-c8zjqoAsPYazzNtq4lPFQzaWIy96s9CpOD_DABpcQE2t3lBzHnph2JijSzuYz-IBKevGfZ5_QygXEDyc54jc1e84nmySVGxWuidGeYKzzLQfHyv-uozL8I6FBGvkzo7vypLk8dsMAcQTAzGWawW8nRplrWS5YMV9YDwm3NG9ltAaj9c37PtHoanKbMxSch2bjx8oZS0nWqfNnVXJ6PFJHYFIuo9dKNby8BcijIYlMebglPGqUxgqi2IW4BwzBems8WqLz_00IyVML4zd6gBrO9VtvR15k0gXHmO8dEtnsoD6TOSNb5h8i0vwKHyW6WLxbkimVBuNfl8aoOupC3jQCH7UmOphRi-8Gad1R3Rujh58qKpnmX4xJYJUlUcePShwC1OWiocHq0_HrMqJwTPC4ljYsQf9JGXIqHpYTafhBvOlahkJbmA%3D%3D)
