name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Unforgiveable and unacceptable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Leave no American behind |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=baec362b03&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

In my decades in the U.S. Army, there was one rule we never forgot:

_Leave no soldier behind._

Joe Biden forgot that rule. And now he must pay- by being impeached and removed.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b24d5c89ff&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who will follow Biden to the unemployment lines!**

Do you remember? Not that long ago?

Do you remember Biden's empty promises of not leaving Americans behind? It's a promise I know well, having lived it for decades of my life.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=81e056c94c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _President Biden appears to have broken his promise to stay in Afghanistan until every American is evacuated.

Marine Corps Gen. Kenneth F. McKenzie Jr. announced Monday evening that the last of the U.S. troops stationed at the Kabul airport had left, completing the military’s drawdown in the country, even though hundreds of Americans likely remain.

McKenzie, commander of U.S. Central Command, said some American citizens who wanted to leave Afghanistan remained in the country. _

So what happened here? Hundreds or thousands of Americans- many trying, in vain, to get to the airport and to freedom- were abandoned to torture, violence, and hostage taking by a thuggish terrorist regime.

We abandoned them. Or more accurately, JOE BIDEN ABANDONED THEM.

Many will not make it out alive. Many will be caught and tortured and ransomed.

And it will all be Biden's fault, and his alone.

**_Biden left Americans behind on the battlefield. Now it's time to leave Biden behind._**
---
|
---
| **Biden is out of his league, and most likely mentally compromised. He callously left and allowed hundreds, and likely thousands, of Americans to die. **

We must impeach Biden. The country demands it. Yet for some reason, party leaders- Swampers on BOTH sides of the aisle- are pushing back on impeaching him!

_Speaking at an event in Kentucky on Wednesday, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell shut down the notion that President Joe Biden would be impeached anytime soon.

"Well, look, the president's not going to be removed from office," McConnell replied when asked whether Biden's behavior was impeachable._

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. What he did cost many American lives, and for NO GOOD REASON!

_I'm not a Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not._

What Biden has done is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool!

We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=aa6302d0d1&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=88c8ea3eaf&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever in 2020. It's a red-trending area in a red-trending state! We can win it in 2022.

No more "nice guy" politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a3120cc7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=31c8d0d086&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d1e04e568d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c3691e09e2&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=33c208ad1d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=33c208ad1d).

body:
| start your engines! 🏎️💨
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7Rd56k41T10ten12HWa9ruh9PaUNlDvsNIuycxi8zxU)
Peter ⎯ This week is full of _really_ exciting trainings that are sure to get your campaign off to the races! 🏁 _And you won’t want to miss out 𑁋 keep reading to learn more and RSVP now!_ **➜ First up is**[**How to Build a Political Campaign Field Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..adandD4NgZWpQrJ9CMKeZrIVnmpZ5w496244PZCTx0w)**on Tuesday, September 7 at 1 pm ET.****
****
**Field operations is one of the most _crucial_ parts of any campaign 𑁋 so do it right! A comprehensive field plan is essential to _winning_. And we’ll teach you everything you need to know about creating and implementing your own field plan on Tuesday!
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..40XWa4yWj1rmS_Yi7mb5labbZf9p7moiAQIgC0lATQo)
---

**➜ Then join us for**[**Do You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6jONPqHnlne0-mGnDz2FIXCGbZVWipbGf9t9QFtl-Ak)**on Tuesday, September 7 at 8 pm ET.****
****
**No one said running for office is easy. But we can help you navigate this big decision!
Tuesday night’s training will help you consider all the details about running for office, decide if you want to do it, and figure out how to get started.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..UiwuipNxHQFtPn-5ueHYhJDfRnr94OV4KtU-ozkOq0Q)
---

**➜ Next is**[**How to Build a Political Campaign Fundraising Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zrOFZs-bGXNVa53JmPcqNLYuNrCxIq_r_RTkMxD8llg)**on Wednesday, September 8 at 1 pm ET.**
****Raising money for your campaign is unavoidable. That’s why you need to plan out how you’re going to do it!
And you can learn exactly how to build a fundraising plan that meets your campaign’s unique needs and goals at Wednesday’s training.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Tzhy5pp0VvqYXmA2pU0MggYBIxL09nbYWL52UXcTkAE)
---

**➜****And be sure to stop by**[**How to Build a Political Campaign Communications Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lDCOBkYebRG2C79rTw2ojF3OZcpUX1IKoy5mxLzqYaI)**on Thursday, September 9 at 1 pm ET.**
****From building voter support to raising money, your communications plan can be a _powerful_ tool.
At Thursday’s training, we’ll help you learn what goes into an effective communications plan and how you can build one that’s just right for _you!_

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3LMVzkMeNCLJR02QBmp4rkYYV_jAeVMuCOYw-BpOfxY)
---

We’ll see you there!
𑁋 The NDTC Team
